title: rosa × turbinata var. francofurtana
intro: Rosa × turbinata var. francofurtana, also known as the Francofurtana Rose, is a specific variety of the Rosa × turbinata hybrid, which is a cross between Rosa centifolia and Rosa damascena. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains geraniol, linalool, and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa × turbinata var. francofurtana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, perfumes, and skincare products, as well as dried flowers and leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, and other herbal remedies.
